metadata.title: AccessGate — Responsible AI POA&M (IBM Bob /review, Pass 2)

parties.name: AccessGate Project
parties.remarks: IBM AI Builders Challenge, July 2026. All product code written through IBM Bob.

roles.title: IBM Bob Review Agent
roles.description: IBM Bob in accessibility-compliance-engineer mode performing /review pass 2.

components.title: AccessGate Conformance Engine
components.description: Local Python engine: caption parser, gap detector, NER scorer, classifier, rule evaluators, SARIF/OSCAL exporters.

components.title: AccessGate MCP Server
components.description: FastMCP server exposing check_conformance, detect_gaps, score_captions tools for IBM Bob self-referential loop.

components.title: Caption Error-Type Classifier
components.description: Logistic regression classifier distinguishing recognition vs edition caption errors. Trained on LibriSpeech / Common Voice. Macro-F1: 0.952.

components.title: IBM Granite Models (Ollama)
components.description: granite3.2:8b (rule rationales), granite3.2-vision:2b (AD draft), granite3-guardian:2b (safety screen).

observations.title: ASR Demographic Disparity Policy Compliance
observations.description: The engine was reviewed for compliance with the AGENTS.md constraint: never auto-fail a caption on ASR evidence alone. Koenecke et al. (PNAS 2020) documents WER disparity across demographic groups.

relevant-evidence.description: src/ner_scorer.py applies a confidence band. Regions with per-word ASR probability below threshold are flagged for human review, not auto-failed. tests/test_ner_scorer.py verifies this behavior.

observations.title: API-Deletion Test
observations.description: All four self-built artifacts (rule engine, gap detector, AD validator, classifier) were verified to run with every hosted AI API removed. The engine produces a report from local Ollama models and local Python code only.

observations.title: Granite Guardian Screen in Fix Loop
observations.description: Every AI-generated audio description line passes through granite3-guardian:2b before being presented to the user. The Accept button is disabled if Guardian does not clear the content.

observations.title: Classifier Bias Documentation
observations.description: The classifier model card at data/training/model_card.md documents training data sources, ASR disparity handling, inter-annotator agreement, limitations, and IBM AI FactSheet alignment.

risks.title: Path Traversal in Temporary File Handling
risks.description: src/app.py constructs /tmp/<uploaded_filename>. A malicious filename could traverse the path. Accepted risk for local-only demo deployment; not exploitable in the intended local use case.

mitigating-factors.description: AccessGate is intended for local use only; the FastAPI server binds to localhost. No public internet exposure in the demo configuration.

risks.title: MIME Type Validation Gap on File Uploads
risks.description: The /check and /fix endpoints do not validate file MIME types or extensions before dispatching to the processing pipeline.

mitigating-factors.description: Local use only; accepted for demo scope. Production hardening noted as future work.

poam-items.title: Harden temporary file handling
poam-items.description: Replace /tmp/<user_filename> construction with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(dir='/tmp', suffix=safe_ext) to prevent path traversal.

status.reason: Accepted for demo scope; scheduled for production hardening.

milestones.title: Implement safe temp file creation in src/app.py

resources.title: Koenecke et al. PNAS 2020 — ASR Racial Disparity
